explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 65 from a base nutrition score of 62. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: contains useful beta-glucans
topPros.explanation: Adds extra cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display.

reviewChecklist: Verify nutrient values are sourced well enough for publishable use.
Review narration for natural flow and trim any robotic lines.
Confirm subtitle density stays readable at phone speed.
Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.
Check that the final tier verdict feels editorially defensible.
nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.

scenes.narrationText: fat is 6.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.
scenes.subtitleText: fat is 6.9g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.

scenes.narrationText: carbs is 66.3g. the fibre support is doing a lot here. for grains, the big question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.
scenes.subtitleText: carbs is 66.3g. the fibre support is doing a lot here. for grains, the big question is whether those carbs come with enough fibre and stability.

scenes.narrationText: protein is 16.9g. the protein quality is strong. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to behave.
scenes.subtitleText: protein is 16.9g. the protein quality is strong. protein helps, but grains still need the carb side to behave.

scenes.narrationText: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the food very far on its own.
scenes.subtitleText: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the food very far on its own.

scenes.narrationText: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral advantage.
scenes.subtitleText: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral advantage.

scenes.narrationText: biggest pros. contains useful beta-glucans because adds cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display. easy to build meals around because works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns. can support digestive regularity because the fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.
